description: A customer ordered a shirt that doesn't fit and wants to exchange it for a different size.

nodes.task_description: Locate the original order and verify the item the customer wants to exchange.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the original order for the 'Blue T-Shirt, Size M'.

nodes.task_description: Check inventory for the requested new size ('Blue T-Shirt, Size L').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the new size is in stock.

nodes.task_description: Create a return authorization for the original item and a new, no-charge order for the replacement item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the exchange in the system.
